criticalRules: Always enforce authentication and authorization in API routes and Server Actions.
Always enforce company_id scope for multi-tenant reads and writes.
Apply persistent schema changes using Neon MCP tools and validate in information_schema.
Use only S3-compatible storage (Backblaze B2) for uploads.
Each new feature must evaluate user notification needs.
documentationSyncPolicy: Whenever architecture, business rules, deploy, security, permissions, integrations, or stack changes, update AGENTS.md, docs/, README.md, .github/copilot-instructions.md and ai_instructions.json in the same delivery.
